import{useEffect}from'react';import{BrowserRouter,Routes,Route}from"react-router-dom";import'./App.css';import NavBar from'./components/NavBar';import NewsContainer from'./components/NewsContainer';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){console.log(window.location.pathname);// darkMod
useEffect(()=>{// icon

const cheakTheme=()=>{if(localStorage.theme==='dark'||!('theme'in localStorage)&&window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches){document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');moonIcon.classList.add("display-none");}else{document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');sunIcon.classList.add('display-none');}};cheakTheme();},[]);// iconToggle
